items.name: Earnings-Call-Sentiment-Analyser · 财报电话会情绪分析
items.summary: Earnings-call sentiment that isolates the residual signal after controlling for the EPS surprise. · 财报电话会情绪分析：剔除 EPS 超预期后的「残差情绪」信号。
items.content: 三层架构——采集(ingestion) / 分析(analysis) / 展示(presentation)。Python 管线：抓取财报电话会文本 → LLM（Anthropic/OpenAI，pydantic + 结构化输出）做情绪打分 → pandas 算出残差情绪（net of EPS surprise）→ 产出 JSON；React 仪表盘加载 JSON，按「个股-季度」多面板展示；可扩展（加 ticker / 加指标 / 换数据源）。工程化 README 十节（论点/架构/数据流图/特性/模块笔记/仪表盘架构/使用指南/扩展配方/排错表/诚实局限）。

items.name: xhs-organizer · 小红书图文整理工具
items.summary: Front-end tool to fetch, classify and archive Xiaohongshu posts, with AI note-merging. · 抓取、分类、收藏小红书图文并支持 AI 整理的纯前端工具。
items.content: 纯前端零构建静态站（index.html + 原生 JS，挂 window.XHS），GitHub Pages 部署。链接整理：经 Jina Reader 抓取标题/正文/图片/话题（已修复登录墙、稳定解析页面真实数据），关键词打分自动归入 16 类（美食/旅行/穿搭…），反爬时「手动粘贴」兜底。收藏库：搜索 / 分类筛选 / 复制 Markdown / 导出 MD·JSON。AI 整理成合集：勾选多篇同主题笔记直连 Claude API（结构化输出）综合去重、分板块改写成一篇长文，可追加整合。整理过的素材笔记自动归档到「📥 已归档」视图（也可手动归档单条 / 取出恢复），主库只留未整理的、保持清爽。多设备云同步：GitHub Contents API 读写私有仓库 Database/xhs.json，复用导航站 pha-config 令牌；GitHub / Anthropic 令牌只存本机浏览器、绝不入库。

items.name: SQL-Viz-for-Edu · 交互式 SQL 教学浏览器
items.summary: Zero-code interactive SQL explorer that shows the query behind every click — built for teaching. · 零代码交互式 SQL 学习工具，每一步自动生成查询，面向教学。
items.content: 纯前端单文件（index.html，无后端、无 LLM，确定性查询构建器）。左侧 schema 浏览器 + 勾表自动 BFS 连接；筛选 / 选列 / Distinct / 分组聚合(COUNT·SUM·AVG·MIN·MAX) / Having / 排序 / Limit 全靠下拉与按钮；底部实时 SQL 面板按 Oracle 风格分色高亮（LIMIT→ROWNUM 注释、TO_DATE/NVL/DECODE 等函数识别、|| 拼接、FULL OUTER JOIN），一键复制进 SQL Developer；场景库用一句话英文问题卡作起点 + 概念分类筛选；工具栏概念徽章随操作实时点亮。四个示例库：电商 / 医院 / 电影 / 大学（每表约 25–50 行，含一对多、多对多桥表、自连接）。

items.name: Prof-Reference-System · 教授推荐信系统
items.summary: Automates student eligibility screening for professor reference letters — built for a UBC prof. · 为 UBC 教授搭建的学生推荐信资格自动筛查系统。
items.content: A student submits an eligibility form through a web portal; the system automatically checks their grade and attendance against configurable tiers and emails them the result. Eligible students receive a link to a single upload portal where they enter their request details (name, email, application link, days-until-deadline, message) and upload their letter of interest and transcript in one page. A background watchdog polls the portal, validates the deadline and request cap, downloads the files to the professor's UBC OneDrive, and emails confirmations to both the student and the professor. The professor manages everything from a local dashboard: roster import per course/section/term, eligibility tiers, a whitelist, reports, and a files view with download/delete. Portal URL and API key are baked into the app so the professor only ever enters their own email.

items.name: Job Application Command Center · 求职指挥中心
items.summary: Single-file job tracker with JD auto-parsing and AI resume / cover-letter drafting. · 单文件求职追踪器，JD 自动解析 + AI 简历/求职信生成。
items.content: Add jobs by pasting a JD (auto-parsed into fields) and track them through an Interested → Applied → Interviewing → Offered/Rejected/Interviewed-Rejected pipeline, kept separate per region. Generate tailored resumes and cover letters as copy-paste prompts for Claude.ai, with region-aware output (English PDF for Canada, two-page Traditional Chinese + English for Hong Kong, Simplified Chinese for Mainland China) plus translation support. The Insights tab visualizes the pipeline as a Sankey flow chart with response and offer rates. The Alerts tab scans pasted LinkedIn job-alert emails or runs a manual region-scoped web search, scores each listing against your profile, and adds matches to the tracker. A Batch Tailor feature generates tailored resume PDFs for multiple selected jobs automatically and saves them back into the tracker.
